title: Bridge Essay: The autonomic effects of deep brain stimulation--a therapeutic opportunity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**The autonomic effects of deep brain stimulation--atherapeutic opportunity.** — Nat Rev Neurol. PMID: 22688783. DOI: 10.1038/nrneurol.2012.100. Deep brain stimulation (DBS) is an expanding field in neurosurgery and has already provided important insights into the fundamental mechanisms underlying brain function. One of the most exciting emerging applications of DBS is modulation of blood pressure, respiration and micturition through its effects on the autonomic nervous system.
